notes:
Except for two minor issues which can be quickly fixed (see below) the game plays just fine.
To see the intro video you need to install the Indeo 3.2 codec with `protontricks 61500 dlls`. (Untick all other codecs but 3.2 because they may crash the installer.)
To get rid of Gnome's title bar in full screen, press Alt+Enter twice once the game has started.
title: Age of Wonders

notes: Seems to run well out of the box.
title: Age of Wonders
